Unser diesjähriges Hüttenfest findet am Samstag, den 25. Juli 2026 ab 18:00 Uhr statt.

Damit sich das Grillgut nicht so einsam fühlt, bringt bitte einen Salat, eine Beilage, ein Dessert oder gleich die ganze Torte mit.

Getränke und Grillgut werden vom WSC gestellt. Bitte bringt euer eigenes Geschirr, Besteck und Gläser mit.

Anmeldung bis 14. Juli 2026 an vorstand@wsc81.de.

', '

Our annual Hüttenfest takes place on Saturday, 25 July 2026 from 6:00 PM.

Please bring a salad, a side dish, a dessert or a cake to accompany the grilled food.

Drinks and grilled items will be provided by the WSC. Please bring your own plates, cutlery and glasses.

Register by 14 July 2026 at vorstand@wsc81.de.

Bash(npx prisma migrate dev --name add_pending_email --create-only 2>&1 && npx prisma migrate deploy 2>&1)

Bash(git add \\
  prisma/schema.prisma \\
  prisma/migrations/20260304000000_add_pending_email/ \\
  src/lib/mailer.ts \\
  src/app/api/user/email/route.ts \\
  src/app/api/user/verify-email-change/route.ts \\
  src/app/api/cron/cleanup/route.ts \\
  src/components/EmailEditor.tsx \\
  src/app/[locale]/account/page.tsx \\
  messages/de.json \\
  messages/en.json && git status)

Bash(git add \\
  prisma/schema.prisma \\
  "prisma/migrations/20260304000000_add_pending_email/" \\
  src/lib/mailer.ts \\
  "src/app/api/user/email/route.ts" \\
  "src/app/api/user/verify-email-change/route.ts" \\
  "src/app/api/cron/cleanup/route.ts" \\
  "src/components/EmailEditor.tsx" \\
  "src/app/[locale]/account/page.tsx" \\
  messages/de.json \\
  messages/en.json && git status)

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
Add editable email with pending verification flow

Users can now request an email change from the account page. The new
address receives a 7-day confirmation link before becoming active; the
old address remains in use until confirmed. Expired pending changes are
cleared by the cron job.

- prisma: add pendingEmail/pendingEmailToken/pendingEmailExpiresAt to User
- mailer: add sendEmailChangeVerification \(DE + EN\)
- api/user/email: PATCH to initiate change, DELETE to cancel
- api/user/verify-email-change: GET handler swaps email on valid token
- cron/cleanup: clear expired pending email changes
- EmailEditor: client component with pending banner and cancel support
- account page: show emailChange status banners, render EmailEditor
- i18n: add Account.emailChange keys \(de + en\)
EOF
\)")
Bash(gh auth login --hostname github.com --git-protocol https --web 2>&1 || true)
Bash(gh repo create MichaelBiermann/wsc81 --private --description "Homepage for Walldorfer Ski-Club 81 e.V." 2>&1)
Bash(git remote add origin https://github.com/MichaelBiermann/wsc81.git && git push -u origin main 2>&1)
Bash(gh auth setup-git --hostname github.com 2>&1 && git push -u origin main 2>&1)
